title: Flash LilyGO hardware and run boot smoke test
description: Why this exists: a build is not a hardware bring-up. The selected LilyGO board must boot real firmware. What needs to be done: document flashing method, bootloader mode, serial console access, erase/recover procedure, first boot logs, panic/assert behavior, and basic shell/log output. Acceptance criteria: physical board flashes successfully; boot reaches LICHEN app init; serial/log output is captured; reset/reboot works; hardware-access absence blocks this Bead with exact missing hardware/access reason.
notes: No-hardware loop block 2026-07-02: requires physical LilyGO/T-Deck hardware access for display/input, flashing, boot logs, packet/app smoke tests, or full bring-up acceptance. Software-only board/model/build slices are already split into completed or separate Beads; resume when a physical board and flashing/serial access are available.
